candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related depreciation row, but it appears as a component within the Cost of sales bucket and rolls into the Cost of sales total already selected.
Operating depreciation associated with cost of revenues, but it appears alongside other cost-of-revenues components and is included in the selected Cost of sales total.

variables.notes: The selected parent row is [Income Statement] Cost of sales. The visible COGS-related depreciation rows are components of that total, not separate same-level expenses to add later. Adding them separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A D&A row, but it appears as a component within Administrative Expenses and the component rows sum to the selected Administrative Expenses total.

variables.notes: The selected parent row is [Income Statement] Administrative Expenses. The SG&A D&A line is a sub-component of that total, so it is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.
